## [06:03 - 07:39]

you see that certain headlines or pieces of copy your images are working really well for you pull that into your funnel so use that as a way to actually optimize your funnel right so if you find one headlines working really well well test out having that headline on your your landing page to see if that increases conversion rates the other thing I quickly want to point out here which is also very important is don't forget that this is only addressing one part of what it actually takes to be successful on Facebook right so we're only looking at the ads here and what you don't want to lose sight of is the entire funnel and you want to keep an eye on your stats along your funnel and so you want to keep an eye on the conversion rate of your landing page at the moment you can see here we've had 19 clicks and eight people opt in at this at this one so for this one it converted at around 40% the tracking was a bit off with this one so it's not correct but if we do this for example so this one was also very high about 50% so our funnel is currently converting really well but we also want to look at the back end right we want to look at how many people are hitting the sales page is it are they opening the email so don't forget that there's an entire funnel at play here and you shouldn't just be looking at your ads okay so finally once we have gone through this and this is an ongoing thing that you run through essentially we're gonna launch this campaign
